TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: kavCon-speech_buya_syulan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: tangi sinsanupaimi tu zana iza zana tazianay salalikilan zinku nani.
S.PHON: taŋi sinsanupaimi tu z~rana iz~ra z~rana taz~rianaj sararikiran z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: tangi sinsanupaimi tu zana iza zana tazianay salalikilan zinku nani.
S.PHON: taŋi sinsanupaimi tu z~rana iz~ra z~rana taz~rianaj sararikiran z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想我們今天來談談那個…這裡的豐年祭活動.
Today let's talk about the Harvest Festival held here.

S.FORM: ngayaw na yaupama sa sa bisayan atu iza kwa tu sasikawmaan na kizaya zataay zataay sikawmaan zinku nani.
S.PHON: ŋajaw na jaupama sa sa βisajan atu iz~ra kwa tu sasikawmaan na kiz~raja z~rataaj z~rataaj sikawmaan z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: ngayaw na yaupama sa sa bisayan atu iza kwa tu sasikawmaan na kizaya zataay zataay sikawmaan zinku nani.
S.PHON: ŋajaw na jaupama sa sa βisajan atu iz~ra kwa tu sasikawmaan na kiz~raja z~rataaj z~rataaj sikawmaan z~rinku nani.

TRANSL.notes: 在那(豐年祭)之前還有母語演講比賽.

S.TRANSL: 在那 之前還有母語演講比賽.

TRANSL.notes: Before that (festival), there will be a speech contest of our mother tongue.

S.TRANSL: Before that , there will be a speech contest of our mother tongue.

S.FORM: aisu bawminankuisu siRab nani.
S.PHON: aisu βawminankuisu siʁaβ nani.
S.FORM: aisu bawminankuisu siRab nani.
S.PHON: aisu βawminankuisu siʁaβ nani.

TRANSL.notes: I have signed you up (for the contest) yesterday.

S.TRANSL: I have signed you up yesterday.

S.FORM: azu yau ni ninu saizaan sa s sanuansu ma qasupaRansu si.
S.PHON: az~ru jau ni ninu saiz~raan sa s sanuansu ma qasupaʁansu si.
S.FORM: azu yau ni ninu saizaan sa s sanuansu ma qasupaRansu si.
S.PHON: az~ru jau ni ninu saiz~raan sa s sanuansu ma qasupaʁansu si.
S.TRANSL: 如果妳有什麼要講的或知道的,

TRANSL.notes: If there is something you want to tell or (something) you know,

S.TRANSL: If there is something you want to tell or you know,

S.FORM: sinsanu iza eh sinsanupaita tazian ya liaotianakita si.
S.PHON: sinsanu iz~ra əh sinsanupaita taz~rian ja ria*tianakita si.
S.FORM: sinsanu iza eh sinsanupaita tazian ya liaotianakita si.
S.PHON: sinsanu iz~ra əh sinsanupaita taz~rian ja ria*tianakita si.
S.TRANSL: 我們就在這裡用聊天的方式談一談.
We can talk about it here.

S.FORM: azu yau s Raynguanku si.
S.PHON: az~ru jau s ʁajŋuanku si.
S.FORM: azu yau s Raynguanku si.
S.PHON: az~ru jau s ʁajŋuanku si.
S.TRANSL: If there is something I don't know,

S.FORM: qawman ipiliku qa tu zataay tu kitut zinku.
S.PHON: qawman ipiriku qa tu z~rataaj tu kitut z~rinku.
S.FORM: qawman ipiliku qa tu zataay tu kitut zinku.
S.PHON: qawman ipiriku qa tu z~rataaj tu kitut z~rinku.

TRANSL.notes: 當然,至少我還會去聽(去請教)我們的(話).

S.TRANSL: 當然,至少我還會去聽 我們的 .

TRANSL.notes: Of course I will at least listen to (consult) our (language).

S.TRANSL: Of course I will at least listen to our .

S.FORM: o mwazati Raynguanku qaya tu sikawmaan nani.
S.PHON: * mwaz~rati ʁajŋuanku qaja tu sikawmaan nani.
S.FORM: o mwazati Raynguanku qaya tu sikawmaan nani.
S.PHON: * mwaz~rati ʁajŋuanku qaja tu sikawmaan nani.
S.TRANSL: There are many words that I don't know.

S.FORM: eh nianu sa izaan u sasikawmaanku tu zana.
S.PHON: əh nianu sa iz~raan u sasikawmaanku tu z~rana.
S.FORM: eh nianu sa izaan u sasikawmaanku tu zana.
S.PHON: əh nianu sa iz~raan u sasikawmaanku tu z~rana.

S.FORM: e zana kebalan.
S.PHON: ə z~rana kəβaran.
S.FORM: e zana kebalan.
S.PHON: ə z~rana kəβaran.

TRANSL.notes: (講)噶瑪蘭的事.
(Say) something about Kavalan.

S.FORM: lalikil lalikil e la lalikil zinku ngidanku sikawma tu zana lalikil.
S.PHON: rarikir rarikir ə ra rarikir z~rinku ŋiɮanku sikawma tu z~rana rarikir.
S.FORM: lalikil lalikil e la lalikil zinku ngidanku sikawma tu zana lalikil.
S.PHON: rarikir rarikir ə ra rarikir z~rinku ŋiɮanku sikawma tu z~rana rarikir.
S.TRANSL: 豐年祭,我想要講的是豐年祭的事.
Harvest Festival, I think I want to talk about the Harvest Festival.

S.FORM: m zinkuay eN kasianemiku nani lalikil nani m astaR auN zuma zana tay zana zataay tazian zinku.
S.PHON: m z~rinkuaj ən kasianəmiku nani rarikir nani m astaʁ aun z~ruma z~rana taj z~rana z~rataaj taz~rian z~rinku.
S.FORM: m zinkuay eN kasianemiku nani lalikil nani m astaR auN zuma zana tay zana zataay tazian zinku.
S.PHON: m z~rinkuaj ən kasianəmiku nani rarikir nani m astaʁ aun z~ruma z~rana taj z~rana z~rataaj taz~rian z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我想我們這裡的豐年祭好像不太一樣.

TRANSL.notes: I think our Harvest Festival here (in Taipei) is different.

S.TRANSL: I think our Harvest Festival here is different.

S.FORM: zuma zataay ta pateRungan zinku kya.
S.PHON: z~ruma z~rataaj ta patəʁuŋan z~rinku kja.
S.FORM: zuma zataay ta pateRungan zinku kya.
S.PHON: z~ruma z~rataaj ta patəʁuŋan z~rinku kja.

TRANSL.notes: (和)我們新社部落的(豐年祭)不一樣.

S.TRANSL: 我們新社部落的 不一樣.

TRANSL.notes: I think our (Harvest Festival) in Xinshe is different.

S.TRANSL: I think our in Xinshe is different.

S.FORM: nayau sayzi nani.
S.PHON: najau sajz~ri nani.
S.FORM: nayau sayzi nani.
S.PHON: najau sajz~ri nani.

S.FORM: pa payanaypa zinimanku tazian ta sanuanku ta ta zana zata tazian u zana baqian zinku.
S.PHON: pa pajanajpa z~rinimanku taz~rian ta sanuanku ta ta z~rana z~rata taz~rian u z~rana βaqian z~rinku.
S.FORM: pa payanaypa zinimanku tazian ta sanuanku ta ta zana zata tazian u zana baqian zinku.
S.PHON: pa pajanajpa z~rinimanku taz~rian ta sanuanku ta ta z~rana z~rata taz~rian u z~rana βaqian z~rinku.

TRANSL.notes: 我要找的題目是我們這邊的還是老人家的(事情)?

S.TRANSL: 我要找的題目是我們這邊的還是老人家的 ?

TRANSL.notes: (I'm wondering) whether my topic should be about here or about the elders.

S.TRANSL: whether my topic should be about here or about the elders.

S.FORM: qawman zana baqianay sikawmaan kawka nengi.
S.PHON: qawman z~rana βaqianaj sikawmaan kawka nəŋi.
S.FORM: qawman zana baqianay sikawmaan kawka nengi.
S.PHON: qawman z~rana βaqianaj sikawmaan kawka nəŋi.

TRANSL.notes: 當然講老人家的話(故事)才好,

S.TRANSL: 當然講老人家的話 才好,
Of course about the elders. It would be better.

S.FORM: yinwei oh zana baqian.
S.PHON: jinwəi *h z~rana βaqian.
S.FORM: yinwei oh zana baqian.
S.PHON: jinwəi *h z~rana βaqian.

S.FORM: zataay tazian maiita tu matatapunti.
S.PHON: z~rataaj taz~rian maiita tu matatapunti.
S.FORM: zataay tazian maiita tu matatapunti.
S.PHON: z~rataaj taz~rian maiita tu matatapunti.

TRANSL.notes: (All things are) mixed up.

S.FORM: iza si maiita tu naqunian 'nay waway zemen.
S.PHON: iz~ra si maiita tu naqunian ʔnaj wawaj z~rəmən.
S.FORM: iza si maiita tu naqunian 'nay waway zemen.
S.PHON: iz~ra si maiita tu naqunian ʔnaj wawaj z~rəmən.

TRANSL.notes: 因為我們這邊沒有什麼事情(歷史).

S.TRANSL: 因為我們這邊沒有什麼事情 .

TRANSL.notes: Because we don't have history here (in Taipei).

S.TRANSL: Because we don't have history here .

S.FORM: sepaw mai tu sepaway.
S.PHON: səpaw mai tu səpawaj.
S.FORM: sepaw mai tu sepaway.
S.PHON: səpaw mai tu səpawaj.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有祭祖的(儀式).
Without (ceremonies of) worshiping ancestors,

S.FORM: nani wama ta zana masangay ni izaan na baqian oN 'nay waway na naquni qawma m 'nay kulikuzan kawka nengiay.
S.PHON: nani wama ta z~rana masaŋaj ni iz~raan na βaqian *n ʔnaj wawaj na naquni qawma m ʔnaj kurikuz~ran kawka nəŋiaj.
S.FORM: nani wama ta zana masangay ni izaan na baqian oN 'nay waway na naquni qawma m 'nay kulikuzan kawka nengiay.
S.PHON: nani wama ta z~rana masaŋaj ni iz~raan na βaqian *n ʔnaj wawaj na naquni qawma m ʔnaj kurikuz~ran kawka nəŋiaj.
S.TRANSL: 只有跟著以前老人家的事蹟走才是好的.
Only following the elders' behaviors before would be good.

S.FORM: o en kulikuzita tazana e pateRungan kawka.
S.PHON: * ən kurikuz~rita taz~rana ə patəʁuŋan kawka.
S.FORM: o en kulikuzita tazana e pateRungan kawka.
S.PHON: * ən kurikuz~rita taz~rana ə patəʁuŋan kawka.

TRANSL.notes: 我們跟著部落的(話)才好嗎?

S.TRANSL: 我們跟著部落的 才好嗎?
It's good for us to follow things in Xinshe?

S.FORM: an.
S.PHON: an.
S.FORM: an.
S.PHON: an.

S.FORM: oh nayauay pasikawmaanku kawka.
S.PHON: *h najauaj pasikawmaanku kawka.
S.FORM: oh nayauay pasikawmaanku kawka.
S.PHON: *h najauaj pasikawmaanku kawka.
S.TRANSL: 喔,我要那樣講才可以嗎?
Oh, should I speak in that way?

S.FORM: m o i utani ziqang na.
S.PHON: m * i utani z~riqaŋ na.
S.FORM: m o i utani ziqang na.
S.PHON: m * i utani z~riqaŋ na.

TRANSL.notes: (要講)多久?
How long (should I speak)?

S.FORM: utulu sanfenchong yinei.
S.PHON: uturu san*ənʦh*ŋ jinəi.
S.FORM: utulu sanfenchong yinei.
S.PHON: uturu san*ənʦh*ŋ jinəi.

S.FORM: utulu utulu sanfenchong zinna m m m oh.
S.PHON: uturu uturu san*ənʦh*ŋ z~rinna m m m *h.
S.FORM: utulu utulu sanfenchong zinna m m m oh.
S.PHON: uturu uturu san*ənʦh*ŋ z~rinna m m m *h.
S.TRANSL: They said within three minutes. Oh.

S.FORM: m XXXX a sikawma aita tu zana kebalan si sikawma aita uman tu zana iza zana.
S.PHON: m **** a sikawma aita tu z~rana kəβaran si sikawma aita uman tu z~rana iz~ra z~rana.
S.FORM: m XXXX a sikawma aita tu zana kebalan si sikawma aita uman tu zana iza zana.
S.PHON: m **** a sikawma aita tu z~rana kəβaran si sikawma aita uman tu z~rana iz~ra z~rana.
S.TRANSL: 我們用噶瑪蘭話講完之後是不是還要講…

TRANSL.notes: We speak in Kavalan (first) and then we speak again in…

S.TRANSL: We speak in Kavalan and then we speak again in…

S.FORM: puntiisu sikawma tu zana zataay sikawmaan zana kebalan nani.
S.PHON: puntiisu sikawma tu z~rana z~rataaj sikawmaan z~rana kəβaran nani.
S.FORM: puntiisu sikawma tu zana zataay sikawmaan zana kebalan nani.
S.PHON: puntiisu sikawma tu z~rana z~rataaj sikawmaan z~rana kəβaran nani.
S.TRANSL: 你講完我們的噶瑪蘭話之後,
After you finish speaking in Kavalan,

S.FORM: sikawma aita muman tu zana Rulam.
S.PHON: sikawma aita muman tu z~rana ʁuram.
S.FORM: sikawma aita muman tu zana Rulam.
S.PHON: sikawma aita muman tu z~rana ʁuram.
S.TRANSL: We will speak again in Mandarin.

S.FORM: m an.
S.PHON: m an.
S.FORM: m an.
S.PHON: m an.

S.FORM: mit Rayngu mipil laq tu sikawmaansu tangi si qawman jieshiansu uman aisu ah.
S.PHON: mit ʁajŋu mipir raq tu sikawmaansu taŋi si qawman jiəshiansu uman aisu ah.
S.FORM: mit Rayngu mipil laq tu sikawmaansu tangi si qawman jieshiansu uman aisu ah.
S.PHON: mit ʁajŋu mipir raq tu sikawmaansu taŋi si qawman jiəshiansu uman aisu ah.
S.TRANSL: 有人聽不懂妳剛剛說的,妳當然必須再解釋一次啊.

TRANSL.notes: Some people might not understand what you have said just now; (so) of course you have to explain again.

S.TRANSL: Some people might not understand what you have said just now; of course you have to explain again.

S.FORM: ninu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.PHON: ninu sikawmaanku taŋi.
S.FORM: ninu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.PHON: ninu sikawmaanku taŋi.
S.TRANSL: What did I say just now?

S.FORM: zinsu jienluede oh sikawma tu nisikawmaansuay tangi na yisina.
S.PHON: z~rinsu jiənruəɮə *h sikawma tu nisikawmaansuaj taŋi na jisina.
S.FORM: zinsu jienluede oh sikawma tu nisikawmaansuay tangi na yisina.
S.PHON: z~rinsu jiənruəɮə *h sikawma tu nisikawmaansuaj taŋi na jisina.
S.TRANSL: 你就很簡略的講一下你剛剛講的意思.
You can talk very briefly about the meaning of what you have said.

W.TRANSL: 完成-講-名物化-2SG.屬格=關係詞

S.FORM: zana2 imina.
S.PHON: z~rana* imina.
S.FORM: zana2 imina.
S.PHON: z~rana* imina.

S.FORM: oh imina.
S.PHON: *h imina.
S.FORM: oh imina.
S.PHON: *h imina.

S.FORM: us u m umanaka tu sikawmaanku tu nianu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.PHON: us u m umanaka tu sikawmaanku tu nianu sikawmaanku taŋi.
S.FORM: us u m umanaka tu sikawmaanku tu nianu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.PHON: us u m umanaka tu sikawmaanku tu nianu sikawmaanku taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛講什麼要再講一遍.
Speak again what I have said.

S.FORM: m sanupa tu zana Rulam si supaRpa qaniyau nayau.
S.PHON: m sanupa tu z~rana ʁuram si supaʁpa qanijau najau.
S.FORM: m sanupa tu zana Rulam si supaRpa qaniyau nayau.
S.PHON: m sanupa tu z~rana ʁuram si supaʁpa qanijau najau.
S.TRANSL: 用國語講了他們就會懂是嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Speak in Mandarin (again), and they will understand?

S.TRANSL: Speak in Mandarin , and they will understand?

S.FORM: an.
S.PHON: an.
S.FORM: an.
S.PHON: an.

S.FORM: oh s nizu kizaya.
S.PHON: *h s niz~ru kiz~raja.
S.FORM: oh s nizu kizaya.
S.PHON: *h s niz~ru kiz~raja.

TRANSL.notes: (Are they) all Amis?

S.FORM: sek ueh shiyizu si niz yau mzukat.
S.PHON: sək uəh shijiz~ru si niz~r jau mz~rukat.
S.FORM: sek ueh shiyizu si niz yau mzukat.
S.PHON: sək uəh shijiz~ru si niz~r jau mz~rukat.

TRANSL.notes: 十一族全部都要出來(參加).
All eleven tribes will come out (to participate in the contest).

S.TRANSL: All eleven tribes will come out .

S.FORM: anu kintani m mlabuay tu huodong zau nani.
S.PHON: anu kintani m mraβuaj tu hu*ɮ*ŋ z~rau nani.
S.FORM: anu kintani m mlabuay tu huodong zau nani.
S.PHON: anu kintani m mraβuaj tu hu*ɮ*ŋ z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 有幾個人要參加這個活動?
How many people will participate in this activity?

S.FORM: qawman yinggai mazmunti zinku yu.
S.PHON: qawman jiŋgai maz~rmunti z~rinku ju.
S.FORM: qawman yinggai mazmunti zinku yu.
S.PHON: qawman jiŋgai maz~rmunti z~rinku ju.
S.TRANSL: 當然我想應該有很多人喔.
I think there would be definitely many people.

S.FORM: tangi Ray aita Ruzukat eh Ru.
S.PHON: taŋi ʁaj aita ʁuz~rukat əh ʁu.
S.FORM: tangi Ray aita Ruzukat eh Ru.
S.PHON: taŋi ʁaj aita ʁuz~rukat əh ʁu.

S.FORM: Ruzukattiita RuqisuR tu za tu dishiyizu nani.
S.PHON: ʁuz~rukattiita ʁuqisuʁ tu z~ra tu ɮishijiz~ru nani.
S.FORM: Ruzukattiita RuqisuR tu za tu dishiyizu nani.
S.PHON: ʁuz~rukattiita ʁuqisuʁ tu z~ra tu ɮishijiz~ru nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們剛起來加入第十一族.

S.FORM: qawman mita qaniyau tu may timaitaan tu iza.
S.PHON: qawman mita qanijau tu maj timaitaan tu iz~ra.
S.FORM: qawman mita qaniyau tu may timaitaan tu iza.
S.PHON: qawman mita qanijau tu maj timaitaan tu iz~ra.
S.TRANSL: Of course they will watch something of us…

S.FORM: tu titaika si ho naquni kebalan.
S.PHON: tu titaika si h* naquni kəβaran.
S.FORM: tu titaika si ho naquni kebalan.
S.PHON: tu titaika si h* naquni kəβaran.
S.TRANSL: 看看噶瑪蘭是怎麼樣的.

TRANSL.notes: (They) will see how Kavalan is.

S.FORM: naquni kebalan zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: naquni kəβaran z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: naquni kebalan zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: naquni kəβaran z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們可能想說噶瑪蘭是怎麼樣的.
They may think how Kavalan is.

S.FORM: o pazukatika aisu aimu kebalan zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: * paz~rukatika aisu aimu kəβaran z~rinnaiku nani.
S.FORM: o pazukatika aisu aimu kebalan zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: * paz~rukatika aisu aimu kəβaran z~rinnaiku nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他跟我說請你把你們噶瑪蘭人叫出來(參加母語演講比賽).

S.TRANSL: 他跟我說請你把你們噶瑪蘭人叫出來 .

TRANSL.notes: He said to me, "(You) tell you Kavalan (to join the contest)."

S.TRANSL: He said to me, " tell you Kavalan ."

S.FORM: qawma ni kmilimtiiku timaimuan ya timaisuan.
S.PHON: qawma ni kmirimtiiku timaimuan ja timaisuan.
S.FORM: qawma ni kmilimtiiku timaimuan ya timaisuan.
S.PHON: qawma ni kmirimtiiku timaimuan ja timaisuan.

TRANSL.notes: (So) I found you … you.

S.FORM: kintaniimi.
S.PHON: kintaniimi.
S.FORM: kintaniimi.
S.PHON: kintaniimi.

S.FORM: m aita kebalan nani kinsepat 'nay mzukatay.
S.PHON: m aita kəβaran nani kinsəpat ʔnaj mz~rukataj.
S.FORM: m aita kebalan nani kinsepat 'nay mzukatay.
S.PHON: m aita kəβaran nani kinsəpat ʔnaj mz~rukataj.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭呢有四人個出來.

TRANSL.notes: We Kavalan have four who go out (to participate in the contest).

S.TRANSL: We Kavalan have four who go out .

S.FORM: zhuangnienzuay kinsepat.
S.PHON: z~rhuaŋniənz~ruaj kinsəpat.
S.FORM: zhuangnienzuay kinsepat.
S.PHON: z~rhuaŋniənz~ruaj kinsəpat.
S.TRANSL: There are four in the adult group.

S.FORM: en kintulu.
S.PHON: ən kinturu.
S.FORM: en kintulu.
S.PHON: ən kinturu.

S.FORM: kintulu aiku nani.
S.PHON: kinturu aiku nani.
S.FORM: kintulu aiku nani.
S.PHON: kinturu aiku nani.

TRANSL.notes: Three (people) including me, and…

S.FORM: ti uci.
S.PHON: ti uʦi.
S.FORM: ti uci.
S.PHON: ti uʦi.

S.FORM: tiuci.
S.PHON: tiuʦi.
S.FORM: tiuci.
S.PHON: tiuʦi.

S.FORM: ti cinRu.
S.PHON: ti ʦinʁu.
S.FORM: ti cinRu.
S.PHON: ti ʦinʁu.

S.FORM: ticinRu supaR ticinRu en aizipna sikawma si.
S.PHON: tiʦinʁu supaʁ tiʦinʁu ən aiz~ripna sikawma si.
S.FORM: ticinRu supaR ticinRu en aizipna sikawma si.
S.PHON: tiʦinʁu supaʁ tiʦinʁu ən aiz~ripna sikawma si.
S.TRANSL: CinRu. Oh, CinRu is good at speaking.

S.FORM: m nei tiuci supaR qaya nani.
S.PHON: m nəi tiuʦi supaʁ qaja nani.
S.FORM: m nei tiuci supaR qaya nani.
S.PHON: m nəi tiuʦi supaʁ qaja nani.

TRANSL.notes: Uci can also (speak well).

S.FORM: m? m supaR ma qaniyau zinku ka?
S.PHON: m? m supaʁ ma qanijau z~rinku ka?
S.FORM: m? m supaR ma qaniyau zinku ka?
S.PHON: m? m supaʁ ma qanijau z~rinku ka?

TRANSL.notes: I think they are better (at speaking than me).

S.FORM: muni aisu.
S.PHON: muni aisu.
S.FORM: muni aisu.
S.PHON: muni aisu.

S.FORM: qa singsi na iza qunipa Rayngu qaya.
S.PHON: qa siŋsi na iz~ra qunipa ʁajŋu qaja.
S.FORM: qa singsi na iza qunipa Rayngu qaya.
S.PHON: qa siŋsi na iz~ra qunipa ʁajŋu qaja.

TRANSL.notes: 妳是那個(母語)老師,怎麼可能不會呢?

S.TRANSL: 妳是那個 老師,怎麼可能不會呢?

TRANSL.notes: How come you, as a teacher of something (our mother tongue) cannot (speak Kavalan)?

S.TRANSL: How come you, as a teacher of something cannot ?

S.FORM: kyataya.
S.PHON: kjataja.
S.FORM: kyataya.
S.PHON: kjataja.

S.FORM: mala mala malatiisu tu iza si tu.
S.PHON: mara mara maratiisu tu iz~ra si tu.
S.FORM: mala mala malatiisu tu iza si tu.
S.PHON: mara mara maratiisu tu iz~ra si tu.

S.FORM: malaiku nage tu zana kebalan.
S.PHON: maraiku nagə tu z~rana kəβaran.
S.FORM: malaiku nage tu zana kebalan.
S.PHON: maraiku nagə tu z~rana kəβaran.

TRANSL.notes: 我拿到噶瑪蘭的(比賽的名次)…
If I win (the prize) of Kavalan (speech contest)…

S.FORM: en malaiku tu zana kebalan nani pisapatti.
S.PHON: ən maraiku tu z~rana kəβaran nani pisapatti.
S.FORM: en malaiku tu zana kebalan nani pisapatti.
S.PHON: ən maraiku tu z~rana kəβaran nani pisapatti.

TRANSL.notes: 我是隨便拿到噶瑪蘭(母語認證)的啦!

S.TRANSL: 我是隨便拿到噶瑪蘭 的啦!

TRANSL.notes: I got (the certificate of) Kavalan by chance.

S.FORM: 'nay usa pisapat zau.
S.PHON: ʔnaj usa pisapat z~rau.
S.FORM: 'nay usa pisapat zau.
S.PHON: ʔnaj usa pisapat z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這個可不是隨隨便便的.
This cannot be done by chance.

S.FORM: azu azu mpuqaw qaya 'nay mizaay mi mitaay tu izanumi ni kaoshiannumi zinku.
S.PHON: az~ru az~ru mpuqaw qaja ʔnaj miz~raaj mi mitaaj tu iz~ranumi ni ka*shiannumi z~rinku.
S.FORM: azu azu mpuqaw qaya 'nay mizaay mi mitaay tu izanumi ni kaoshiannumi zinku.
S.PHON: az~ru az~ru mpuqaw qaja ʔnaj miz~raaj mi mitaaj tu iz~ranumi ni ka*shiannumi z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 說得好像那些監考官都瞎了一樣.

S.FORM: nani sunis yau usiq qaya na zakuay sunis 'nay saswaniay.
S.PHON: nani sunis jau usiq qaja na z~rakuaj sunis ʔnaj saswaniaj.
S.FORM: nani sunis yau usiq qaya na zakuay sunis 'nay saswaniay.
S.PHON: nani sunis jau usiq qaja na z~rakuaj sunis ʔnaj saswaniaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子的部份也有一個是我最小的孩子.

TRANSL.notes: As for the child group, one (of them) is my youngest child.

S.TRANSL: As for the child group, one is my youngest child.

S.FORM: oh wunienji nani.
S.PHON: *h wuniənji nani.
S.FORM: oh wunienji nani.
S.PHON: *h wuniənji nani.

S.FORM: supaR sikawma.
S.PHON: supaʁ sikawma.
S.FORM: supaR sikawma.
S.PHON: supaʁ sikawma.

TRANSL.notes: (他)會講嗎?
Can (he) speak?

S.FORM: qawman tudanta kawka supaR.
S.PHON: qawman tuɮanta kawka supaʁ.
S.FORM: qawman tudanta kawka supaR.
S.PHON: qawman tuɮanta kawka supaʁ.

TRANSL.notes: Of course (he) can (speak Kavalan) only if we teach him.

S.TRANSL: Of course can only if we teach him.

S.FORM: azu mai mai tudanta si taRnina qaya na sunis.
S.PHON: az~ru mai mai tuɮanta si taʁnina qaja na sunis.
S.FORM: azu mai mai tudanta si taRnina qaya na sunis.
S.PHON: az~ru mai mai tuɮanta si taʁnina qaja na sunis.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們沒有教,小孩子怎麼會呢?

TRANSL.notes: If we didn't teach a child, how could he (speak Kavalan)?

S.TRANSL: If we didn't teach a child, how could he ?

S.FORM: nayauanku patud qaya sunis 'nay tu sikawmaan.
S.PHON: najauanku patuɮ qaja sunis ʔnaj tu sikawmaan.
S.FORM: nayauanku patud qaya sunis 'nay tu sikawmaan.
S.PHON: najauanku patuɮ qaja sunis ʔnaj tu sikawmaan.
S.TRANSL: I taught him to speak in that way.

S.FORM: azu maiimu miza tangi.
S.PHON: az~ru maiimu miz~ra taŋi.
S.FORM: azu maiimu miza tangi.
S.PHON: az~ru maiimu miz~ra taŋi.
S.TRANSL: If you don't do this right now,

S.FORM: mlingsiw tu sikawmaan si.
S.PHON: mriŋsiw tu sikawmaan si.
S.FORM: mlingsiw tu sikawmaan si.
S.PHON: mriŋsiw tu sikawmaan si.

TRANSL.notes: 學習(演講比賽)要講的話題,

S.FORM: amawaR qamaiti qamaitiita tu sikawmaan zinku Ranaw.
S.PHON: amawaʁ qamaiti qamaitiita tu sikawmaan z~rinku ʁanaw.
S.FORM: amawaR qamaiti qamaitiita tu sikawmaan zinku Ranaw.
S.PHON: amawaʁ qamaiti qamaitiita tu sikawmaan z~rinku ʁanaw.
S.TRANSL: 往後,我想我們就沒有語言了.
Afterwards, I think we will lose our language.

S.FORM: palingsiwansu.
S.PHON: pariŋsiwansu.
S.FORM: palingsiwansu.
S.PHON: pariŋsiwansu.

S.FORM: pa patudankuti tu sikawmaan tangi nani.
S.PHON: pa patuɮankuti tu sikawmaan taŋi nani.
S.FORM: pa patudankuti tu sikawmaan tangi nani.
S.PHON: pa patuɮankuti tu sikawmaan taŋi nani.

TRANSL.notes: I teach (him) to speak now...

S.FORM: izaika.
S.PHON: iz~raika.
S.FORM: izaika.
S.PHON: iz~raika.

S.FORM: canjiaka tu zau 'nay iza si kawka nengi.
S.PHON: ʦanjiaka tu z~rau ʔnaj iz~ra si kawka nəŋi.
S.FORM: canjiaka tu zau 'nay iza si kawka nengi.
S.PHON: ʦanjiaka tu z~rau ʔnaj iz~ra si kawka nəŋi.

TRANSL.notes: 參加這個(演講比賽)才好/可以.

S.TRANSL: 參加這個 才好/可以.

TRANSL.notes: It would be good to participate in this (contest).

S.TRANSL: It would be good to participate in this .

S.FORM: paiza tu anemta.
S.PHON: paiz~ra tu anəmta.
S.FORM: paiza tu anemta.
S.PHON: paiz~ra tu anəmta.

S.FORM: paRaya tu anemta paqeseR tu anemta zinku.
S.PHON: paʁaja tu anəmta paqəsəʁ tu anəmta z~rinku.
S.FORM: paRaya tu anemta paqeseR tu anemta zinku.
S.PHON: paʁaja tu anəmta paqəsəʁ tu anəmta z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 壯大我們的信心,鼓勵我們的心.
To strengthen our confidence and encourage our heart.

S.FORM: zu qawman alaisu zinku amawaR haw tu izaan tu ni bisaian tayan tashulinan zinku.
S.PHON: z~ru qawman araisu z~rinku amawaʁ haw tu iz~raan tu ni βisaian tajan tashurinan z~rinku.
S.FORM: zu qawman alaisu zinku amawaR haw tu izaan tu ni bisaian tayan tashulinan zinku.
S.PHON: z~ru qawman araisu z~rinku amawaʁ haw tu iz~raan tu ni βisaian tajan tashurinan z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 之後在樹林的比賽我相信你絕對可以得名.

TRANSL.notes: I am sure you can win (the prize of) the contest in Shulin.

S.TRANSL: I am sure you can win the contest in Shulin.

S.FORM: nayauma sikawmaanta.
S.PHON: najauma sikawmaanta.
S.FORM: nayauma sikawmaanta.
S.PHON: najauma sikawmaanta.

S.FORM: oh nayauma.
S.PHON: *h najauma.
S.FORM: oh nayauma.
S.PHON: *h najauma.

S.FORM: oh ay.
S.PHON: *h aj.
S.FORM: oh ay.
S.PHON: *h aj.
